homepage.title: Ingame Studios
homepage.description: We are an ambitious game development studio in Brno, Czech Republic
homepage.text_excerpt:
Ingame Studios
WE ARE AN AMBITIOUS GAME DEVELOPMENT STUDIO WITH A LOVE AND PASSION FOR MAKING GAMES
WE ARE AN AMBITIOUS GAME DEVELOPMENT STUDIO WITH A LOVE AND PASSION FOR MAKING GAMES
About us
We are game developers with vision, responsibility, and the best tools
Our goal is to learn, perfect and innovate game development. We strive to be the best in the Czech Republic, best in Europe, best in the world.
Our foundation is strong, we have a clear creative vision and have direct communication to everyone in the team.
Our operation is driven by stable funding, development know-how and proven development planning expertise, based on personal ownership and responsibility.
Our game is built on the Unreal Engine, as it‘s the best commercial engine and toolset.
We love making games, and we love to play them
Our team of 40+ members have worked on many cool Czech games over the last 20 years including Vietcong, Hidden & Dangerous 2, the Mafia series, the Arma series, Kingdom Come Deliverance, Dead Trigger,
Shadowguns series, UFO, Silent Hill: Downpour, Cold War, Vigor and others.
We are enthusiasts – game making is not only our job, but also our hobby.
Are you interested? Join our team
Visit rockay city
Previous
0/X
Next
Visit rockay city
Partner
THE PARTNER PROGRAM IS DESIGNED TO NOT ONLY EXPAND OUR AUDIENCE BUT YOURS AS WELL
We are looking for content creators with a passion for gaming and a knack for social media. If that sounds like you then apply for our partner program! The aim is to not only expose our game to new players
but to showcase your channel to new viewers. This program is meant to be as accessible as possible, whether you have amassed a major following or built yourself a small community, let’s work together to reach our goals.
EARN REWARDS AND HAVE INSIDE KNOWLEDGE OF THE STUDIO AND OUR PROJECT
As a partner, you will be eligible to exclusive benefits as well as first looks at what the team is cooking up next!
If you’d like to learn more about the ins and outs of the program, you can learn more here:
link to the blog.
Become a partner
Palace
Previous
0/X
Next
Our office is a palace in the centre of Brno. With over a 1000 square meters, there is a lot of space for the team, in-house motion capture, a big gym and a large relaxation area.
Jobs
WE ARE ALWAYS BUILDING TOWARDS AN EFFICIENT AND COLLABORATIVE TEAM OF THE BEST GAME DEVELOPERS AROUND
We value experience and seniority, but also freshness and enthusiasm. If you are ambitious, smart, creative, brave, responsible,
honest and motivated, you are welcome in our team. Some roles require on-site presence, while others can be remote, depending on the team’s needs.
BRNO IS A FUTURE CAPITAL OF GAME DEVELOPMENT. COME WORK WITH US
Brno is a small city in the heart of Europe. Located between Vienna, Prague and Bratislava. There are another five capitals within 500 km from Brno (Berlin, Warsaw, Budapest, Zagreb, Ljubljana).
For more information visit:
GO TO BRNO
#BRNOREGION
BRNO EXPAT CENTRE
BRNO
